emails.subject: PRC MEMO
emails.body: PRC MEMO Sherri, Can you let Jeff know that the attached memo is going to go out tonight under his name. Steve Kean, Cindy Olson and legal have signed off on it. If you or he have any questions or concerns, please call me at 53231. Thanks, Karen
